news.title: Nvidia's Quarterly Profit Hits $43 Billion on Strong A.I. Chip Sales
news.snippet: Total profit for the fiscal year was $120 billion, the company said. Three years ago, it was just $4.4 billion.

tech.title: How I'd Learn ML in 2026 (If I Could Start Over)
tech.snippet: All you need to learn ML in 2026 is a laptop and a list of the steps you need to take.
